metadata.description: docs-creator + component-creator plugins for Claude Code — documentation authoring and Figma-to-code component creation.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs. Schema 1.3 (M11 complete — all 7 Wave 2 subagents aligned: tech-stack-profiler, architecture-analyzer, design-system-scanner, component-inventory, data-flow-mapper, framework-idiom-extractor, feature-flow-detector). Two-stream scanner output: slim JSON + Markdown Content section with ### → routing. Canonical multi-root filename convention: docs/ drop 'reference-' prefix. Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator. Ships analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, update-frontend-docs, analyze-api-contracts, init-project, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, menu and more.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Code Connect integration, and component registry. Auto-emits version banner + update-available indicator on every slash-command invocation via UserPromptSubmit hook.
